decisions.rationale: install.sh runs memory.init() automatically; eliminates all If Enabled guards
prime() already shows active epics; /resume reads show(epic_id).metadata['handoff']
Feature decisions live in CONTEXT.md; merges/rollbacks in git log; table was redundant
Drop manual grep-based modes; /sync always uses prime() + stats(); JSONL is git-tracked

decisions.decision: Add active epic details + plan progress
decisions.rationale: Show in-progress epics with feature_slug, plan_number, child task completion ratio
install.sh detects and removes existing STATE.md from target projects

constraints: Memory engine must be initialized before any command that previously read STATE.md
prime() output must remain token-efficient (~500-1500 tokens) despite added epic details
Handoff metadata on epics must handle the no active epic case
All 17 commands that reference STATE.md must be updated
workflow_checks.py and workflow_validate.py need Python-level changes
install.sh needs STATE.md removed from template loop + auto-delete logic
.claude/CLAUDE.md, CLAUDE.md, and README.md reference STATE.md — update docs
openQuestions: When no epic is in progress (idle project), where does /pause store handoff? Lean toward transient session issue.
